Weak Performance in the U.K.

There was a decline in simulation subscribers for older generation da Vinci systems in the U.S., as they are being replaced by newer platforms. This transition period poses challenges in maintaining subscriber numbers.

Expansion of Sales Force

The company concluded Q3 2025 with a solid cash position of $14.2 million and no debt, bolstered by an $18 million convertible notes financing. This financial stability provides a foundation for future investments and strategic initiatives.

Strategic Acquisition of Xepi

Pelthos’ acquisition of Xepi, an FDA-approved treatment for impetigo, complements its existing product portfolio. This strategic acquisition leverages Pelthos’ commercial infrastructure, enhancing its market offering and competitive edge.
